channel.name: OpenEMR Patient to HIE
channel.description: Phase 3a.5 (issue #31), federation A1, per Gate K (ADR 0009) and ADR 0008. The acquired CAH's own Mirth (Host #2) polls OpenEMR's FHIR2 R4 Patient endpoint using SMART Backend Services OAuth (client_credentials, private_key_jwt - signed in-channel with the client's RSA key), and conditionally upserts each patient into the HIE's HAPI ACROSS THE CROSS-HOST BOUNDARY (Host #1, 192.168.1.176:8080), keyed on Patient.identifier under https://lab.example/identifiers/openemr-cah. Never sets HAPI resource ids. Outbound only; OpenEMR is read-only to this channel.
channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
channel.postprocessingScript: // This script executes once after a message has been processed return;
